zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabetha Aldriche於1568年出生在英國素瑞阿爾布瑞時，她的父親John Aldrich30歲，母親Margaret Bacon31歲。她於1590年11月8日與Richard John Deane de Farley在英國素瑞阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年11月23日在她的家鄉享年27歲，埋葬在英國素瑞阿爾布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabetha Aldriche于1568年出生在英国素瑞阿爾布瑞时，她的父亲John Aldrich30岁，母亲Margaret Bacon31岁。她于1590年11月8日与Richard John Deane de Farley在英国素瑞阿爾布瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年11月23日在她的家乡享年27岁，埋葬在英国素瑞阿爾布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Aldriche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Aldridge 1, from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich.
History: The earliest recorded bearer of this surname in North America is George Alrich, who came from Derbyshire to MA in 1631.

variants.name: Arledge
meanings: English: variant of   Aldrich   or   Aldridge  . A few bearers of the name are recorded in southern England in the 17th–19th centuries, but the name appears to have died out in Britain.
History: Isaac Arledge died in Fairfield County, SC, in 1790.

variants.name: Aldridge
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich, representing any one of three Old English personal names, Æthelrīc, Ælfrīc, and Ealdrīc, formed respectively from æthel- ‘noble’, ælf ‘elf, sprite’, and (e)ald ‘old, honored’ + rīc ‘ruler’.

habitational name from Aldridge (Staffordshire), Aldridge Grove in Hampden (Buckinghamshire), or from a similarly named unidentified place in the West Midlands, recorded in Domesday Book as Alrewic, from Old English alor ‘alder’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabetha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabetha Aldriche was born in 1568, in Albury, Surrey, England, her father, John Aldrich, was 30 and her mother, Margaret Bacon, was 31. She married Richard John Deane de Farley on 8 November 1590, in Albury, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 November 1595, in her hometown, at the age of 27, and was buried in Albury, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabetha Aldriche est née en 1568, à Albury, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John Aldrich, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bacon, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard John Deane de Farley le 8 novembre 1590, à Albury, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1595, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Albury, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabetha Aldriche 1568 in Albury, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Aldrich 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bacon 31. Sie hat am 8. November 1590 in Albury, Surrey, England Richard John Deane de Farley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. November 1595 im Alter von 27 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Albury, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabetha Aldriche è nata il nel 1568 nel Albury, Surrey, England, sua padre, John Aldrich, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret Bacon, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard John Deane de Farley il 8 novembre 1590, nel Albury, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 novembre 1595, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Albury, Surrey, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabetha Aldriche(이)가 1568년 영국 수리 알버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Aldrich(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bacon(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1590년 11월 8일 영국 수리 알버이에서 Richard John Deane de Farley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 11월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 알버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabetha Aldriche nasceu em 1568, em Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Aldrich, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bacon, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard John Deane de Farley em 8 de novembro de 1590, em Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1595, em sua cidade natal, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Ste: сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabetha Aldriche родилась в 1568 г. в местности албури, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени John Aldrich было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bacon, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard John Deane de Farley 8 ноября 1590 г. в местности албури, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 ноября 1595 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности албури, сурри, Англия.

Se casó con Richard John Deane de Farley el 8 de noviembre de 1590, en Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1595, en su pueblo, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra.
